page_content:
Restriction: Permission of TLTC-Teaching and Learning Transformation Center.

Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.

Formerly: UNIV798.

TOXI - Toxicology

TOXI609 Methods in Toxicology (1-3 Credits)

Provides the opportunity for graduate students to become familiar

with laboratory methods used by the staff to study the effect of toxins and environmental pollutants on living systems. Permission and credit arranged individually.

Restriction: Permission of CMNS-Chemical & Life Sciences department. Repeatable to: 6 credits.
